name: hermes-desktop
description: Hermes Web UI desktop host: open a Web UI URL (optional locale). Does not modify packages/client.
author: Hermes Web UI

scripts.dist: npm run dist:pack && npm run dist:zip
scripts.dist:win: npm run dist:pack:win && npm run dist:zip
scripts.dist:mac: npm run dist:pack:mac && npm run dist:zip
scripts.dist:linux: npm run dist:pack:linux && npm run dist:zip
scripts.dist:all: npm run dist:pack:win && npm run dist:pack:mac && npm run dist:pack:linux && npm run dist:zip
